title: Cosmic Rays and Ionizing Radiation: Catastrophic Error Events
description: Investigate the impact of cosmic rays and ionizing radiation on quantum computers. Learn how high-energy particles create correlated errors across multiple qubits and explore shielding and software mitigation strategies.
learningObjectives: Explain how cosmic ray impacts create quasiparticle bursts in superconducting devices
Analyze the spatial and temporal correlations of cosmic ray-induced errors
Calculate cosmic ray event rates and their impact on quantum error correction
Design detection and mitigation strategies for cosmic ray events
Evaluate underground laboratory and shielding approaches
